# NPM tarball integrity manifest
#
# Generated by `.github/workflows/npm-publish.yml` on every `v*` tag push.
# PLAN-025 Batch I F-comp-002: file reset to exactly 1 line (the current
# published tarball SHA) — previously accumulated 51 stale entries across
# rebuilds, which confused adopter integrity checks.
#
# Regeneration command (manual, local verification):
#
#   cd npm && npm pack --dry-run --json | jq -r '.[0].shasum'
#
# Each line below maps: <sha256>  <tarball-name>
# Appended ONLY by npm-publish.yml on successful publish.
#
79c6d7772ad40e92aac1c6349f891af254f7e399aebe63276bfafb8362e769aa  ceo-orchestration-1.0.0.tgz
